meaning: n.(古希腊、古罗马的)奏乐堂,音乐厅,剧场
examples: But it is just this odeum that wins praises from many famous conductors and composers in China.
Compared with those modern buildings around it, Shanghai Odeum is not so "outstanding" for its simple appearance.
This paper presents a quantificational evaluation to a specified high standard odeum via measuring on some main acoustic parameters.
